verses.text: Kumpi Hezekiah in hih thu a zak ciangin a dahna hangin a puante balkekin puanhampi silh a, Topa' biakinn sungah a pai hi
Tua ciangin amah in biakinn sung a ukpa Eliakim, lai-atpa Shebnah, leh siampi khangham zawdeuhte puanhampi silhsakin Amoz' tapa kamsang Isaiah kiangah a sawl hi
Amaute in ama kiangah, “Hezekiah in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Tuni pen lungkham ni, hong kitai ni, mindai ni ahi hi. Naungekte a suah hun tung a, amaute hin'khiatna ding thatang omlo hi

Ama topa ahi Assiria kumpipa in a nungta Pasian a zahko dingin a sawl a ulianpa' kammalte khempeuh Topa na Pasian in za-in, Topa na Pasian in a zaksa thute nialkhin khading hi. Tua ahih ciangin a omlai mite-a' dingin thu ngen in,’ ci hi,” a ci uh hi
Kumpi Hezekiah' nasemte Isaiah kiang hong tun' uh ciangin
Isaiah in amaute kiangah, “Na topa uh kiangah hih bangin gen un. ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Assiria kumpipa' nasemte in kei hong simmawhna, na zaksa uh thute hangin lau kei un
En un, keimah in ama tungah thu khat ka piangsak ding a, amah in kamdawn khat za-in a gamah ciahkik ding hi. Ama gam mahah namsau tawh amah a tukna ding ka piangsak ding hi,” ci hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi
Assiria kumpipa in Lakhish nusia khinin Libnah khua tawh a kidona thu, a ulianpa in za ahih manin, kumpipa kiangah thu a dong dingin a pai hi
Ethiopia kumpi Tirhakah amah a sim dingin a hong kuankhiat khitna thu kumpipa in a zak ciangin, amah in Hezekiah kiangah kamtaite sawl kikin
“Judah kumpi Hezekiah kiangah hih bangin gen un: ‘Assiria kumpipa' khutsungah Jerusalem kipialo ding hi, ci-a a hong ciamna tawh na suan' na Pasian' khemsa-in om kei in
En in, Assiria kumpite in gam khempeuh a hihnasa, a suksiat mangna thu na za khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin nang hong honkhiazo ding ahi hiam
Ka pu ka pate in a suksiat minam Gozan, Haran, Rezef, leh Telassar gam sunga Eden mite, tua minamte' pasian-te in amaute honkhiazo ahi hiam
Hamath kumpipa, Arpad kumpipa, Sefarvaim khuapi kumpipa, Hena kumpipa, ahih kei leh Ivvah kumpipa koi-ah om ahi uh hiam, ci hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi
Hezekiah in kamtaite tung panin a lai sangin a sim hi. Tua ciangin Topa' biakinn-ah Hezekiah paito a, Topa' mai-ah a lai a zal hi

Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Topa' mai-ah thu ngenin, “ Topa , Israel Pasian, kherub tungah a tupa aw, leitung kumpi gam khempeuh lakah nangmah, nangmah bek Pasian na hi a, nangmah in vantung leh leitung na bawl hi
Topa aw, na bil hong ngat in la hong za in. Topa aw, na mitte hak in la hong mu in. Tua ciangin a nungta Pasian a zahkona dingin a hong khak Sennakherib' thute za in
A taktakin, Topa aw, Assiria kumpite in minam dangte leh a gam uh siasak uh a
a pasian-te uh meikhuk sungah lotsak uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pasian hiloin, mihingte' khut tawh a kibawl sing leh suang ahi hi. Tua ahih manin tuate kisusia hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, Topa kote' Pasian aw, leitung kumpi gam khempeuh in nang, nang bek Pasian na hihna a theihna dingun ama khutsung panin kote hong honkhia in, kong thum hi, Topa aw,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Amoz' tapa Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah thu puak a, “Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib tawh kisai kei tungah nong thungetna ka zazo hi,’ ci hi
Amah tawh kisai-in Topa' gensa thu hih bang ahi hi: Zion khuapi in nang hong simmawh a, nang hong nuihsan hi. Jerusalem khuapi in na nungah a lu hong peisan hi
Kua zahko-in, a simmawh na hi hiam? Kua langpangin na aw sang sakin kihihsakna tawh gamta na hi hiam? Israel-te' a Siangthopa, a simmawh na hi hi

Na kamtaite tawh Topa na zahko a, nangmah in, ‘Ka leeng tampite tawh mual sangpen munah ka pai khin a, Lebanon gam tawng pek dong ka tung khin hi. A taamtak sangpente ka phukmang khin a, a taaksan hoihpente zong ka phukmang khin hi. A gam tawngnung pen dongah keimah ka lut a, a tulak thukpen dongah zong ka lut khin hi
Tuikhukte ka to a, gamdang tuite ka dawn hi. Ka khenuai tawh Egypt lui khempeuh ka keusak hi,’ na ci hi
Sawt pek lai-in ka ngaihsutsa ahihlam za nailo na hi hiam? Tanglai pek panin ka geelkholhsa hi a, tu-a ka tun'sak ding thute kulh a nei khuapite ninbulomtangin na heina ding
a sunga tengte a hatna teng kilakhia-in, lungkia-in cihna ding theiloin, gamlak singnote leh lo ngeekte bangin, innkhumzanga lopate bangin a om laitak, a khan'khit ma-in a sih ding ka geelsa ahi hi
Ahih hangin keimah in na tutsukna leh na pusuahna leh na sungtumna, kei tungah na hehna ka thei khin hi

Kei tungah na hehna hang leh na kiphatsakna ka bilah hong tun'khitna hangin na nakah nakpheh hong bulhin, na kamah kamkaih kong bulh ding a, nong kuankhiatna lam mahah kong lehhei kik ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah, “Nang-a' dingin lim hih bang hong hi ding hi: Tu kumin ama thu-in a pote na ne ding a, a kum nihna ciangin tua bangmahin a selkhiate na ne ding hi. A kum thumna ciangin khai tuhin atin, leenggui suanin a gah na ne ding hi
Tua ciangin Judah gam sungah a suakta a omlaite in singkung bangin a thuk lamah zung kha kikin a tung lamah gah hong gahto ding hi
bang hang hiam cih leh a omlaite Jerusalem panin hong paikhia ding a, a suakta khat Zion Mual panin hong paikhia ding hi. Topa' deih luatna in hih thu hong tungsak ding hi

“Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipa tawh kisai-in hih bangin gen hi: ‘Hih khuapi sungah amah hong pailo ding a, thaltang khat zong lawnlo ding hi. Khuapi mai-ah lum tawh zong hong pailoin, khuapi simna-in phung zong cianglo ding hi
Amah hong paina lampi mah tawnin amah kilehkik ding a, hih khuapi sungah amah hong pailo ding hi, Topa in ci hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh keima min ka khualna leh ka nasempa David tungah ka ciamsa thu hangin hih khuapi ka hu ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua zanin Topa' vantung mi paikhia a, Assiria-te giahphualah galkap tul za khat leh tul sawmgiat leh tul nga a that hi. Zingsang tungin mite a thawh ciangin, hihte khempeuh si luanghawm na hi hi
Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib kihemkhia a, inn-ah ciahin Nineveh-ah a teng hi

Tua ciangin amah in ama pasian Nisrok' biakinn sungah bia-in a om laitakin, ama tapate Adrammelek leh Sharezer in namsau tawh amah thatin Ararat gamah a tai uh hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Esarhaddon in a uk hi.
